summary: Tested Save Proposal functionality - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Backend API correctly saves and retrieves customer_name, expected_booking_date, flights_booked, itinerary, and pricing_breakdown. Frontend TripBuilder flow (Book FIT Package → city/airport selection → Create Proposal → Save As Proposal modal → ProposalView redirect) works end-to-end.

issues: React hydration warning about <span> inside <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

save_proposal_api.details: POST /api/proposals correctly saves customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, proposal_name, expected_booking_date, flights_booked, pricing_breakdown, itinerary, and all trip details

get_proposal_api.details: GET /api/proposals/{id} returns all customer and proposal fields correctly

airport_dropdown.details: Airport search dropdown shows DXB - Dubai International Airport option and can be selected via click or keyboard

trip_builder_flow.details: Complete flow works: Book FIT Package → Enter Dubai city → Select DXB airport → Create Proposal → TripBuilder page loads

save_proposal_modal.details: SaveProposalModal opens from 'Save As Proposal' button, validates required fields (customer_name, booking_date, flights_booked radio), and saves proposal

proposal_view_redirect.details: After saving, redirects to ProposalView page with correct proposal data (Proposal No, Trip Name, dates, pricing)

itinerary_generation.details: Itinerary correctly generated with 5 days for 4-night Dubai trip

critical_code_review_comments: SaveProposalModal (lines 14-311 in TripBuilder.jsx) correctly validates required fields before submission
handleSaveProposalWithData (lines 2403-2540) builds complete proposalData object with all customer info
Backend ProposalCreate model (lines 106-140 in server.py) includes all extended fields
Backend create_proposal endpoint (lines 487-543) correctly stores all fields in MongoDB

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Trip Builder and Save Proposal features working

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_E2E Customer proposal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Save Proposal flow fully working. Test flow: Login → Book FIT Package → Enter city 'Dubai' → Type 'DXB' in airport field → Select from dropdown → Create Proposal → Click 'Save As Proposal' → Fill required fields (Name, Booking Date, Flights Booked radio) → Click SAVE PROPOSAL → Redirects to ProposalView with saved data. All customer details (customer_name, expected_booking_date, flights_booked, pricing_breakdown, itinerary) correctly stored in database.
